headline: Assessing Blackstone (BX) Valuation After Liquidity Jitters And Redemption Caps In Private Credit
summary: Blackstone (BX) moved into focus after it restricted withdrawals at its flagship private credit fund, echoing similar redemption caps at peers and prompting investors to reassess liquidity across private credit and private equity products. See our latest analysis for Blackstone. At a share price of $115.35, Blackstone has retreated sharply this year, with a year to date share price return down 27.36%, even though the 3 year total shareholder return of 43.52% points to a stronger longer run...
